label: Trait ingestion thoughts override
description: Overrides ingestion thoughts for a specific ingestible or meat source category for pawns with a given trait degree.

thing.label: Thing
thing.description: ThingDef of the specific ingestible this override applies to. Mutually exclusive with meatSource.

meatSource.label: Meat source
meatSource.description: Meat source category this override applies to when thing is not set.

thoughts.label: Thoughts
thoughts.description: ThoughtDefs added (or suppressed) when the pawn ingests the matched item.

thoughtsDirect.label: Thoughts (direct)
thoughtsDirect.description: ThoughtDefs added (or suppressed) when the pawn directly ingests the matched item (not as an ingredient).

thoughtsAsIngredient.label: Thoughts (as ingredient)
thoughtsAsIngredient.description: ThoughtDefs added (or suppressed) when the pawn consumes a meal containing the matched item as an ingredient.
